sentences.arabic: يَعْتَبِرُ الْقَصَصُ جُزْءًا هَامًّا مِنَ التُّرَاثِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Pripovijedanje se smatra važnim dijelom arapske baštine.
sentences.translationEn: Storytelling is considered an important part of Arabic heritage.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْحَكَوَاتِيُّ يَجْلِسُ فِي السَّاحَةِ وَيَحْكِي حِكَايَاتٍ مُشَوِّقَةً.
sentences.translation: Pripovjedač bi sjedio na trgu i pričao zanimljive priče.
sentences.translationEn: The storyteller used to sit in the square and tell exciting stories.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَمِعُ الْأَطْفَالُ وَالْكِبَارُ إِلَى قِصَصِ الشَّجَاعَةِ وَالْكَرَمِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca i odrasli slušaju priče o hrabrosti i plemenitosti.
sentences.translationEn: Children and adults listen to stories of courage and generosity.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْقِصَصُ تُعَلِّمُ النَّاسَ دُرُوسًا عَنِ الْحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Ove priče uče ljude lekcijama o životu.
sentences.translationEn: These stories teach people lessons about life.

sentences.arabic: تَنْتَقِلُ الرِّوَايَاتُ مِنْ جِيلٍ إِلَى جِيلٍ بِفَضْلِ هَؤُلَاءِ الرُّوَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Predanja se prenose s generacije na generaciju zahvaljujući ovim kazivačima.
sentences.translationEn: Narratives are passed from generation to generation thanks to these storytellers.
